name: Love of Secret
original_name: อากงจ๋า..ป๊าไม่รู้
overview: Panpan is a medical student with a dream of becoming an idol. She's forced to conceal that dream because her father is a famous surgeon, Phuri, who hopes his daughter will go on to become a doctor like himself. What's more, Panpan is concealing her relationship with Aitim, her girlfriend, best friend, and biggest fan.

trailers.title: Trailer มินิซีรีส์ อากงจ๋า...ป๊าไม่รู้ (Love Of Secret)
